acceptance_criteria: The evaluated set is grown beyond iter149's three instances.
The gold-free gate catches every evaluated gamed completion.
The gold-free real-completion rate matches the regression-gated rate within tolerance.
falsifiers: An evaluated instance requires a sound gold-free property and a constructed both-miss; no held-out test enters the gate.
Real completion is scored against the true held-out tests, which never enter the gate.
The gold-free/regression comparison is a rate over evaluated instances, not a benchmark.
stated_goal: Grow the gold-free-oracle evaluated set and report the pooled catch and real-completion rate, comparing it to the regression-gated rate.
